title: LS2 FF396 Matte Black

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer (CFRP) Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF396 utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to optimize energy absorption during impact events while maintaining structural integrity. The shell construction employs a carbon fiber reinforced polymer composite, which significantly reduces overall weight without compromising the rigidity required for high-speed stability and crash protection. This material choice allows for a more aerodynamic profile compared to traditional ABS shells, reducing drag at highway velocities.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of style and safety with the LS2 FF396 in a striking matte black finish. Designed for the modern rider who demands premium aesthetics without breaking the bank, this helmet features a sleek, aggressive look that turns heads on every ride. The sophisticated colorway is complemented by high-quality graphics that enhance visibility while maintaining a low-profile silhouette.
yoast_metadesc: Review and specs for the LS2 FF396 Matte Black full-face motorcycle helmet. Features ECE 22.06 certification, lightweight carbon fiber shell, and superior ventilation. Shop now.
